top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'blue' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_blue_eyes
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'blue' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_blue_eyes
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'blue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_blue_eyes
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'blue' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_blue_eyes
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.colour = 'blue') * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_blue_eyes
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'blue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 2) AS percentage_blue_eyes
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'blue' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_blue_eyes
FROM superhero s
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id;
